languages.text: {n}Себериан прожигает вас взглядом и, так и не дождавшись ответа, вздыхает.{/n} "Придет время — и мы продолжим оборвавшийся разговор. Рано или поздно".
{n}Seberian's gaze bores into yours and then, receiving no answer, he sighs.{/n} "When the time comes, we shall resume this interrupted conversation. Sooner or later."
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан прожигает вас взглядом и, так и не дождавшись ответа, вздыхает.{/n} "Придет время — и мы продолжим оборвавшийся разговор. Рано или поздно".

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安的目光直刺你的双眼，见你没有反应，他叹了口气。{/n}“我们迟早会继续这场被打断的谈话。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's gaze bores into yours and then, receiving no answer, he sighs.{/n} "When the time comes, we shall resume this interrupted conversation. Sooner or later."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安的目光直刺你的双眼，见你没有反应，他叹了口气。{/n}“我们迟早会继续这场被打断的谈话。”

languages.text: {n}La mirada de Seberian se clava en tus ojos. Al no recibir respuesta, suspira.{/n} «Cuando llegue el momento, retomaremos esta conversación. Tarde o temprano».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's gaze bores into yours and then, receiving no answer, he sighs.{/n} "When the time comes, we shall resume this interrupted conversation. Sooner or later."

traits.locale_text: {n}La mirada de Seberian se clava en tus ojos. Al no recibir respuesta, suspira.{/n} «Cuando llegue el momento, retomaremos esta conversación. Tarde o temprano».

languages.text: {n}Seberian plonge son regard dans le vôtre et, faute de réponse de votre part, il soupire :{/n} « Nous reprendrons cette conversation le moment venu. Tôt ou tard. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's gaze bores into yours and then, receiving no answer, he sighs.{/n} "When the time comes, we shall resume this interrupted conversation. Sooner or later."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian plonge son regard dans le vôtre et, faute de réponse de votre part, il soupire :{/n} « Nous reprendrons cette conversation le moment venu. Tôt ou tard. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian'ın bakışları, seninkilere delip geçiyor. Hiçbir cevap alamayınca iç çekiyor.{/n} "Zamanı geldiğinde, yarıda kalan bu konuşmaya devam edeceğiz. Er ya da geç o gün gelecek."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's gaze bores into yours and then, receiving no answer, he sighs.{/n} "When the time comes, we shall resume this interrupted conversation. Sooner or later."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian'ın bakışları, seninkilere delip geçiyor. Hiçbir cevap alamayınca iç çekiyor.{/n} "Zamanı geldiğinde, yarıda kalan bu konuşmaya devam edeceğiz. Er ya da geç o gün gelecek."

languages.text: {n}Seberian durchbohrt dich mit seinem Blick und seufzt, als er keine Antwort erhält.{/n} "Wir werden diese unterbrochene Unterhaltung zu gegebener Zeit fortsetzen. Früher oder später."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's gaze bores into yours and then, receiving no answer, he sighs.{/n} "When the time comes, we shall resume this interrupted conversation. Sooner or later."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian durchbohrt dich mit seinem Blick und seufzt, als er keine Antwort erhält.{/n} "Wir werden diese unterbrochene Unterhaltung zu gegebener Zeit fortsetzen. Früher oder später."

languages.text: {n}セベリアンの視線があなたに迫り、返事がないと彼はため息をつく。{/n}「時が来たら、この中断された会話を再開する。いずれの日か。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's gaze bores into yours and then, receiving no answer, he sighs.{/n} "When the time comes, we shall resume this interrupted conversation. Sooner or later."
